# zedcloud_kubernetes_snapshot (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the cluster

### Optional

- `name` (String) Name of the snapshot
- `snapshot_timeout` (Number) Timeout in seconds for the snapshot operation (create/restore)
- `x_request_id` (String) User-Agent specified id to track a request

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) When the snapshot record was created (Unix timestamp)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `k3s_version` (String) k3s Version
- `location` (String) Snapshot Location in ZKS server
- `node_name` (String) Name of the node where the snapshot was taken
- `size` (String) Size of the snapshot in bytes
- `status` (List of Object) Status information for the snapshot (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--status))

<a id="nestedatt--status"></a>
### Nested Schema for `status`

Read-Only:

- `message` (String)
- `ready_to_use` (Boolean)
- `state` (String)
